entity.label: Zuriel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Rock of God, chief of the family of the Merarites (Num. 3:35) at the time of the Exodus.

nodes.label: Zuriel
nodes.description: Rock of God, chief of the family of the Merarites (Num. 3:35) at the time of the Exodus.

verses.text: And the chief of the house of the father of the families of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail: these shall pitch on the side of the tabernacle northward.
